title: bromus insignis var. scopulorum
intro: Bromus insignis var. scopulorum, also known as Scabiosa Grass or Scurry Grass, is a type of flowering plant in the grass family (Poaceae). This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Bromus insignis var. scopulorum include its ability to treat skin irritations and wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties for therapeutic purposes.
